text: Here, within these sleek modern corridors and the vivid exhibition space marked 'R+D,' I am awash in a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The interplay of glass, light, and color inspires reflection on progress, knowledge, and the human desire to search for meaning. There is an energy of ideas forming and evolving—the ever-changing dance between humanity and innovation. I feel invited to inquire, to question, and ultimately to learn from what unfolds in this fusion of art, science, and technology.
